name: Tip-055845
context: 解决多智能体冲突问题
pattern: def resolve_conflict(agents): →     for agent in agents: →     return max(votes, key=votes.get)

name: Async+Batch Pattern
pattern: async def batch_process(tasks): →     results = await asyncio.gather(*[process(b) for b in batches]) →     return flatten(results)
code_example:
async def batch_process(tasks):
    # 技巧: 批处理
    batches = chunk(tasks, size=10)
    results = await asyncio.gather(*[process(b) for b in batches])
    return flatten(results)
